content.text:
I see you've started Claude Code in the correct project directory. Let me display the Quick Start Menu:

```
=== Quick Start Menu ===
bcbcg: Bash Coding with BCG (Bash Console Guide)
adocrbags: Requirements writing with RBAGS (Admin Google Spec)
gad: Work on GAD (Google AsciiDoc Differ)

Which would you like to start with? (Enter acronym)
```

I'm ready to help! You can enter one of the acronyms above, or let me know what you'd like to work on. I have full read and edit access to the `lenses/`, `Tools/`, and related directories, and I'm familiar with the project's bash scripts, AsciiDoc specifications, and the various tooling systems (Job Jockey, Concept Model Kit, etc.).

What would you like to do?
